value.value: Wrong output: Queries return distinct lists by default; need to use "all" to retain duplicates
Wrong output: Queries return distinct lists by default; need to use "all" to retain duplicates
Wrong output: According to spec, if either list contains a null, the result is null
Treats null as point overload, translating to "Contains" operator, which has different semantics (and different result)
Treats null as point overload, translating to "In" operator, which has different semantics (and different result)
Converts included in to in, which has different semantics when second argument is null
